Records workspace proposal.

## Import

```ts
import { recordWorkspaceProposal } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item";
```

## Signature

```ts
function recordWorkspaceProposal(
	input: WorkspaceProposalReadyRequest<TDraft> | unknown,
	options: WorkspaceProposalProjectorOptions = {},
): WorkspaceProposalRecordResult<TDraft>
```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `input` | `WorkspaceProposalReadyRequest<TDraft> \| unknown` | Input value to project or validate. |
| `options` | `WorkspaceProposalProjectorOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The record workspace proposal result.
